text_original: The characters are deep. And reflect emotion, a rareity
text_zh: 角色刻画深刻，且能反映情感，实属罕见。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! It is truly an honor to be part of your journey and to know that our characters have touched your heart with their emotional depth. Your support is the fuel that keeps us going. We will keep working hard to create even more magical memories for you! Thanks for being awesome!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！能成为您旅程的一部分，并得知我们的角色以其情感深度触动了您的心弦，这真是我们的荣幸。您的支持是激励我们不断前行的动力。我们会继续努力，为您创造更多神奇的回忆！感谢您的支持，您太棒了！
